programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Felicity's new pen has a way with words, making them a reality.
Hedge Flies High: Eager to experience the thrill of flying, Hedge tests Toad's newly acquired power kite. Unfortunately, this helps the Weasels come up with an idea to enter Toad Hall.
Regatta: Everyone is determined to win the annual regatta race, especially the previous winner, Ratty. But even he has to learn that winning isn't the only goal.
Raspberry: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Raspberry performing It's Cool to Be Kind and being extremely kind and very helpful to everyone.
Tomato: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Tomato performing his mind-boggling magic act - if Kiwi ever stops interrupting him with his questions.
Wild Guy bites off a little more than he could chew running the shop for Mrs O ...but luckily, his friends are there to help.
When the friends go to stay over in the Bat Cave, they have to keep quiet so they don't wake up the hibernating bats.
When Lala and Baba's 'fluffy' blows apart, they must wait a long time for a new one to grow.
Utha & the Butterfly Lifecycle: Séamus visits his friend Utha the horse, learns all about camouflage and discovers that caterpillars are baby butterflies in disguise!
Flix's parents Colza and Zeno, are treating themselves to a special night out at a cattery hotel.
Juno's Bubble Bath Breakout: When Juno the baby hippo gets sticky from tree sap, only a bubble bath will get her unsticky, but the moment she sees Vida's big bathtub, she runs away scared.
Fergie's Horrible Hiccups: When Fergie gets hiccups right before singing with her band, she calls on Vida for a quick preshow cure. Vida knows what will work - Fergie needs to get scared.
Gingerbread Build Off: When their dad's twin brother Uncle Ian comes to visit, the two sets of twins face off in a gingerbread building competition.
Santa's Dream Factory Helpers: During Uncle Ian's holiday visit, one of the Scott family's Christmas dreams actually comes true when Santa needs help repairing a present on Christmas Eve.
When James and Sarah compete for the title of 'best steam driver,' James accidentally spills a burning coal into a pile of wood, sparking a fire.
When Charlie and Bronwyn take the kids on a sailing lesson, Charlie feels upstaged by Peter and a seagull.
Elliot is being coached as he has a match with his friends this afternoon on the court at the Basketball Arena, but it's not any old match - it's sponsored by Dizzy Deliveries! (SL)
Aibhe and Ice Cream Maker Neil are waiting for Joe to arrive to start making Ice Cream. Joe makes his deliveries and also makes a serious mess in the kitchen! (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Quacking Quandary: When Diesel hears a strange noise that sounds like a Swamp Monster, he gets too scared to pull deliveries through the area.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Stinking Delivery: None of the engines want to deliver a super stinky compost delivery, so they make a 'hide and stink' game sneakily coupling it to each other.

programmes.show_name: Andy's Global Adventures: Baby Animal Missions
programmes.show_description: Andy and the Puma Cubs: Andy, Jen, and Scout head to Patagonia in South America on a baby animal mission in search of puma cubs.
Punky has got a new bird feeder. But when she leaves the door open, a bird flies into the kitchen, frightening Cranky and Con. It's up to Punky to lead the bird back outside.
Tá Sonia agus Hugo ag péinteáil balla inniu ach is cosúil gur fearr d'am a thógáil.
Tá Sonia ag tóraíocht sliogán le caitheamh isteach sa scairdeán buíochais.
Lily finds a relaxing wind-chime on the beach. Meanwhile, Driftwood Bay is the busiest it has ever been and poor Hatsie and her Clickety Clackety Train are working very hard.
Lily finds an old key washed up on the beach and sets sail for Driftwood Bay to find its owner. She follows a trail which leads her all over the island.
Bad weather threatens Oisín and Síofra's plan to go to the beach. Fionn and Bó find different ways of having fun in the rain. Oisín learns about rainbows.
Nora wants to find the perfect place to grow her little plant.
The duo spot a man with a white beard and a red coat, and wonder whether he could be Father Christmas.
Kiva, Saul and Angus must find a clever way to help a turtle who needs help getting unstuck.
The Wee Littles build Bitsy a shoe shop in the garden when she realises she's outgrown her favourite shoes!
Felicity's new pen has a way with words, making them a reality.
Henry meets a friendly Parrot. It turns out that Parrot has been left a secret treasure map by his great grandfather and with Henry's help they decide to go and find it.
Gingerbread Build Off: When their dad's twin brother Uncle Ian comes to visit, the two sets of twins face off in a gingerbread building competition.
Santa's Dream Factory Helpers: During Uncle Ian's holiday visit, one of the Scott family's Christmas dreams actually comes true when Santa needs help repairing a present on Christmas Eve.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: When the Smith Twins cause Mouse's smell-making machine to backfire, the kids have to leave their stinky house for the night.
When Rooney makes a new friend in Magpie, Hare and Rooney end up in their first boxing match.
Elliot is being coached as he has a match with his friends this afternoon on the court at the Basketball Arena, but it's not any old match - it's sponsored by Dizzy Deliveries! (SL)
Aibhe and Ice Cream Maker Neil are waiting for Joe to arrive to start making Ice Cream. Joe makes his deliveries and also makes a serious mess in the kitchen! (SL)

programmes.show_description: Electricity: Nina shows us how electricity is made and how it gets to our houses!

programmes.show_name: Nina And The Neurons: Go Engineering
programmes.show_description: Electricity: Nina shows us how electricity is made and how it gets to our houses!

BaBa loves playing with a noisy drum but discovers that not everyone likes loud noises.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'chicken', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Dee meets a funky chicken, a hatching chicken and a cock-a-doodle-do-ing chicken!
Eau De Toad: Toad decides to create his own stylish cologne. However, when the weasels ruin it and occupy his home, he must find a way to get back into Toad Hall.
The Ghost Tour: On the night of Halloween, Toad boasts that there is a ghost in Toad Hall. Captivated by his story, his friends go to validate his claim, but they soon discover the truth.
Brussels Sprout: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's tiny Brussels Sprout performing I'm Mighty and proving how great he is.
Artichoke: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the rhyming queen Artichoke performing her lovely song I'm a Little Artichoke with a little help from Chicory.
Séamus takes a game of 'Séamus Says...' with his friends a little too far.
When Otto, Oona and Isabelle fly around the island to get some materials for the Hoots' log, Isabelle's position as top flyer is challenged.
Phoenix has picked up a strange strong smell after playing with Mossy, and on the way to the river, the puffins try to figure out what caused it!
Pine Marten, Moorhen & Terrapin: When Lily asks Seamus to clean Blossom's stable, he escapes to the river and meets a hungry pine marten, two scruffy moorhen chicks and a lonely terrapin.
It's National Dog Day and Flix wants to celebrate in style by going to Dog Town. But he finds out that his family's name is cat litter in Dog Town.
Koa's Prickly Predicament: Vida helps Koa get over his fear of needles when he needs a porcupine quill removed. The key is distractions - more specifically, a very funny joke from Popcorn!
Vida's New Helpers: When Popcorn gets sick, Fergie and Kipp offer to help Vida out in the clinic. But their competitive natures get in the way of them working together.
Celebration of Lights: It's Diwali and Mayor Murthy is determined to have the best Diwali celebration that Steamport has ever seen!
Best Dogs Ever: When Ayana's new adopted dog is an adorable chaos maker, the brothers find a way to not only to burn off some of its energy, but also to train the little guy.
A 'pesky' mole causes trouble for Moose when the mole decides that Moose's Wild Man Golf course is the perfect place to build a few molehills.
It's the Annual Pontypandy Bread Baking Competition and Hannah's ambition accidentally causes her to spark a wildfire.
Featherwand: Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. When a passing cockatoo drops a feather, Bingo has an idea for a new game called 'Featherwand'.
Squash: When Dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo pretend that they are in control of their every move.
Promises: Bluey keeps breaking her promises. But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.
Omelette: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Don't Train On My Parade: When Sir Topham Hatt's springtime parade floral float is destroyed before delivery, Thomas and the engines find the spring in Sodor to save the parade.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Shiny Spiffy Sandy: After the vehicles decide to show their best-selves by staying clean and sparkling for the Tidmouth Sheds open house, they are confronted by sinkhole ruining the tracks.

programmes.show_name: Andy's Global Adventures: Baby Animal Missions
programmes.show_description: Andy and the Baby Humpback: Andy, Jen & Scout head to the tropical islands of Hawaii to see how a baby humpback whale prepares for its migration North.
After Cranky's slipper goes missing, she blames Rufus and calls him a pest. Punky decides to find the slipper and prove that Rufus is a good dog.
Ní maith le Sonia fuaim na toirní ach imríonn an chlann cluiche spraíúil.
Níl sé chomh héasca sin pióg a bhácáil agus tú faoi bhrú ama.
Salty's precious logbook has gone missing on Driftwood Bay and all the evidence points to Puffin being the culprit.
Lily finds a little hoop washed up on the beach, which is just perfect for the Driftwood Bay Carnival. Lily and Bull decide to see how many prizes they can win.
Síofra is organising a picnic for her friends. Will Oisín resist the temptation to eat all the food?
Woof is afraid of the thunder, so Nelly and Nora try to calm him down.
On a windy day, Nelly and Nora discover that everything is talking - even the clothes line.
Animation about a five-year-old girl who knows how to make her own fun and whose imagination knows no bounds.
The Wee Littles decide to create their very own Woolly little Wool Maker as it is cold In the meadow.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'chicken', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Dee meets a funky chicken, a hatching chicken and a cock-a-doodle-do-ing chicken!
Henry meets a friendly Guitar. Guitar and the band want to put on one last show before they retire but they don't have a singer. Henry becomes a Singer for the day.
Celebration of Lights: It's Diwali and Mayor Murthy is determined to have the best Diwali celebration that Steamport has ever seen!
Best Dogs Ever: When Ayana's new adopted dog is an adorable chaos maker, the brothers find a way to not only to burn off some of its energy, but also to train the little guy.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Cat becomes the superhero Cat Crusader again, but Gherkin frames her so she looks bad.
Rooney and Hare find an ancient rock painting. Mr Wolf wants to turn Backwoods into a tourist attraction but will one measly painting be enough?
Featherwand: Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. When a passing cockatoo drops a feather, Bingo has an idea for a new game called 'Featherwand'.
Squash: When Dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo pretend that they are in control of their every move.
Promises: Bluey keeps breaking her promises. But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.
Omelette: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programmes.show_description: Bin Lorry: Nina investigates how a bin lorry works - with the help of Ollie, her smell neuron.
